# Swisscoast AG

> Swiss blockchain innovation company building decentralized finance (DeFi) protocols on Hedera Hashgraph.

## About

Swisscoast AG is a Swiss technology company founded in 2003, headquartered in Pfäffikon SZ, Switzerland. The company specializes in distributed ledger technology (DLT) with a focus on the Hedera Hashgraph ecosystem. Swisscoast builds production-grade DeFi protocols, stablecoins, and prediction markets.

## Core Products

- **BIDI (Biodiversitäts-Gutscheine)**: A municipal blockchain initiative for the Swiss community of Muri bei Bern. Volunteers earn on-chain BIDI vouchers for biodiversity work (hedge care, neophyte removal, riparian restoration) and redeem them 1:1 (1 BIDI = 1 CHF) at participating local merchants. Live at https://muri.swisscoast.org
- **HLiquity**: A decentralized borrowing protocol on Hedera Hashgraph enabling users to borrow HCHF stablecoins against HBAR collateral at 0% interest.
- **HCHF (Hedera Swiss Franc)**: The first private digital Swiss Franc stablecoin, pegged 1:1 to CHF, built on Hedera.
- **HORUS**: A decentralized prediction market platform on Hedera Hashgraph for event-based trading.
- **dCHF (Decentralized Swiss Franc)**: A CHF-pegged stablecoin on Ethereum, part of the broader Swiss Franc stablecoin ecosystem.

## Services

- Smart contract development on Hedera Hashgraph and EVM chains
- DLT strategy consulting and architecture design
- Tokenization and digital asset advisory
- Web3 infrastructure and protocol development
- Blockchain security auditing
